case_title: WALKER, PAULINE VS ANDREA HAYNES; AND PASTEL HAIR SALON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY WALKER, PAULINE AS TO DEFENDANT ANDREA HAYNES; AND PASTEL HAIR SALON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-21-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
